steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The data reveals a stark contrast: 0.20 probability in open-policy countries versus 0.03 in restrictive-policy countries. This decisive difference shows policy environment directly shaped which countries received swap lines.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean influential in determining — the policy environment directly shaped which countries got swap lines. Substitute each choice:
  • "predicated on": means based upon — this reverses the direction; it would make swap line decisions the foundation, not the policy environment. ✗
  • "mediated by": means indirectly channeled through — the data shows a direct link (0.20 vs. 0.03), not an indirect one through some intermediary. ✗
  • "material to": means significant or consequential to — the stark probability difference confirms policy environment was directly consequential to swap line decisions. ✓
  • "decoupled from": means disconnected from — the opposite of what the data shows; the two probabilities are clearly linked to policy type. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
